song.title: Rest Rest Thee Weary Heart
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Rest, rest thee, weary heart, Let toil and anguish cease; Take from Thy Savior’s hands Thine heritage of peace.
[V2] 2) Lie low before His feet, Too low thou canst not be, For sacred calm is here, And here is liberty.
[v3] 3) Submit, lay down thine arms, Nor question, nor rebel; So shalt thou hear erewhile His whisper, It is well.
[V4] 4) No secret wound of thine, Though it be great or small, Presume to hide from Him; Confess, confess it all.
[V5] 5) Nor merit of thine own Upon His altar place; All is of Christ alone, And of His perfect grace.
[V6] 6) Rest, rest thee, weary heart, Let care and anguish cease; Take from thy Savior’s hands Thine heritage of peace.
song.author: Lucy A. Bennet
